rationale: The citing paper is a conceptual review that explicitly synthesizes prior consumer-neuroscience studies (including pricing and decision-making examples) to build its five-part agenda and methodological discussion. The cited paper is a directly relevant empirical fMRI pricing study on valuation mechanisms (price primacy, MPFC/NAcc), so it plausibly serves as substantive mechanism evidence rather than a purely incidental mention; with only DOI-level match and no in-text snippet, this pair should be kept for full relation judgment.
